title: Join the Community vibe Hackathon at Elevate London!
excerpt:
After an amazing Hackathon in New York, we’re bringing it to you, London folks :tada: 
In just 30 minutes, you’ll build a mini app with monday vibe - side by side with our product and AI teams :robot: who’ll be there to …

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
After an amazing Hackathon in New York, we’re bringing it to you, London folks

In just 30 minutes, you’ll build a mini app with monday vibe - side by side with our product and AI teams who’ll be there to guide you and answer your questions.

The winner gets free Elevate 2026 tickets and a full team day out, plus a few surprise prizes we can’t share just yet

Spots are limited!
So make sure to find the hackathon in the agenda and sign up now!

See you soon
